last_completed_round.direction_name: Reopen The Measured 64x384 Fixed-Main-Tile Control Path
last_completed_round.hypothesis: Round 12/17 closes the grouping family for now: the 4-row retry was the best member of that family on the accepted export base, but tightening further to 2 rows regressed back to 26.06694412 ms and pushed DRAM up to 21.47. That means the local PTX-adjacent grouping lever has likely plateaued. The next best move is to reopen the older but directly measured `64x384` fixed-main-tile control path, which is the strongest remaining alternate family with explicit ranking evidence in the repo.

notes: Build passed for round 14/17. Node A will measure the result next.
